experiment: Exp03: Noisy Cafe — Speech + Sine Wave

ssl_accuracy.description: GCC-PHAT is robust to tonal interference

beamforming.ds_vs_mvdr: DS gives better WER than MVDR for tonal interference
beamforming.mvdr_problem: MVDR attenuates speech by 6dB and introduces distortion with 15mm array. SI-SDR looks better but ASR quality is worse.
beamforming.reason: Array aperture (45mm) is only lambda/7.6 at 1kHz — too small for meaningful spatial filtering

enhancement.reason: Whisper is more robust to steady tones than to processing artifacts

tone_detection_fix.description: Added tonal interference detection to GatedEnhancer
tone_detection_fix.detection_method: Spectral peak prominence above median floor (15dB threshold)
tone_detection_fix.result: WER improved from 40.9% to 27.3% by skipping enhancement when tone detected

recommendations: Use DS beamforming (not MVDR) for tonal interference
Skip enhancement when tonal interference detected
MVDR only appropriate for broadband noise with wider arrays
Enhancement module (spectral sub) needs improvement — hurts even without interference
